mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains PrintersPage with an enroll_in_instant_ink button locator, but no enrollment action method or API helper to actually perform the enrollment. The test case requires the printer to already be enrolled before the test begins, so this is a precondition setup requirement. The locator alone is insufficient - an enrollment method or API helper would be needed. Such components may exist in other batches containing helper classes or API utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription verification methods, API helpers, or subscription state checking components found in this batch. This batch contains only printer management page objects with UI locators. Subscription verification would require API helpers or backend utilities which are not present in these printer page object files.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. This batch contains only printer management page objects. Subscription status checking would require API helpers or backend utilities which are not present in these files.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No pause plan buttons, CIT modal components, or pause instant ink links found in this batch. This batch contains printer management pages (PrintersPage, PrinterSelectionPage, PrinterReplacementPage, PrinterUpdatesPage, PrivacyBannerPage) but none of these have pause plan functionality. The pause plan UI components would likely be on a subscription management or instant ink dashboard page which is not in this batch.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: This test case (C44873414) is about verifying the Billing Cycle Period card on the Print and Payment History page for HP Instant Ink pause plan functionality. It requires components for: (1) Print and Payment History page navigation and display, (2) Billing Cycle Period card with plan pause information, (3) Complimentary pages progress bar with tooltips and value display, (4) Additional pages progress bar with tooltips and value display, (5) Total pages printed display, (6) Time manipulation utilities for 32-day shift, (7) Print job simulation API, (8) Page refresh and data synchronization, (9) Visual verification of progress bar colors (black vs yellow), (10) Responsive testing across desktop/mobile/tablet, (11) Tooltip interactions with device-specific handling. This codebase batch (batch 14) contains 5 printer management page objects: PrinterReplacementPage (printer setup/replacement flow), PrinterSelectionPage (printer selection with carousel), PrinterUpdatesPage (automatic updates acceptance), PrintersPage (printer management, online status, Instant Ink enrollment), and PrivacyBannerPage (cookie consent). None of these files contain: Print and Payment History page, billing cycle components, payment history components, pause plan display elements, progress bars for page usage, complimentary/additional pages tracking, tooltips for page information, total pages printed display, time manipulation utilities, print simulation APIs, or any billing/subscription UI elements. The only tangential connection is PrintersPage.enroll_in_instant_ink locator which could theoretically be used for enrollment setup, but the test assumes enrollment is already complete and focuses on billing cycle display after pause plan activation. The components needed for this test case would be in different batches containing: instant ink dashboard pages, billing/payment pages, subscription management pages, API helper utilities for time manipulation and print simulation, and visual testing utilities. This batch is entirely focused on printer device management (adding, selecting, replacing, updating printers) rather than subscription billing and payment tracking.
